name: Quick-Cash Inc.
description_short: Quick-Cash Inc. is a 6-location pawn shop chain in the Greater Cincinnati area offering collateral-based loans, gold/jewelry buying, auto pawning, and check cashing services since 1987.
description_long:
Quick-Cash Inc. was established in 1987 and has grown into a regional pawn shop chain operating 6 locations across the Greater Cincinnati area and southern Indiana. The company has spent over 30 years serving its community through a range of cash-based financial services. Their physical presence spans Florence, Covington, Taylor Mill, Newport, and Bellevue in Kentucky, plus Greendale in Indiana, with consistent operating hours Monday-Friday 10 AM–6 PM and Saturday 10 AM–5 PM.

Quick-Cash offers a diverse portfolio of collateral-based and cash services including secured loans against personal items and vehicles, gold and jewelry buying, check cashing, coin exchange, auto pawning, and a layaway program. They also provide jewelry repair and sizing services, manage a discount retail operation selling redeemed items, and handle firearms transactions. This multi-service model allows customers to access quick cash through various channels—either by pawning items, selling valuables directly, or using check cashing services.

The company distinguishes itself through explicitly stated company values emphasizing compassion, understanding, and integrity in serving customers' financial needs. Their stated vision is to be "the #1 pawn shop in the United States" by being "the BEST"—focusing on customer service, customer experience, and employee quality rather than chain size. This positioning suggests a focus on local, relationship-based service in a traditionally high-volume industry.

Quick-Cash operates as a traditional pawn shop without published information about interest rates, loan terms, lending limits, or regulatory compliance details. Like all pawn operations, customers must understand that pawned items can be forfeited if loans aren't repaid, and that valuations are made by in-store appraisers. The company's regional footprint limits accessibility for consumers outside the greater Cincinnati/Louisville corridor. No online lending platform, mobile app, or remote application process is evident from the website.
pros: 6 physical locations across Greater Cincinnati and southern Indiana for in-person service and item evaluation
Established 37+ years in business (since 1987) with proven operational history in the local market
Multiple ways to access cash: pawn loans, direct item sales, check cashing, and auto pawning
Full-service jewelry and firearms expertise with repair services and specialized product knowledge
Consistent weekday hours (10 AM–6 PM Mon–Fri) and Saturday availability for working customers
Layaway program option for customers who want to purchase items on payment plan basis
Company culture emphasizing integrity and compassion in serving customers with financial needs
cons: No published information on loan terms, interest rates, maximum loan amounts, or repayment periods
Limited geographic footprint (6 stores in Cincinnati/Louisville area only) with no online lending option
Website lacks regulatory compliance information, licensing details, or disclosures required for lenders
Pawned items are at risk of forfeiture if loans aren't repaid—higher stake than unsecured lending
No apparent customer reviews, ratings, or testimonials visible on website to verify service quality claims
best_for: People in the greater Cincinnati area who need quick cash and have items to pawn or sell
Customers seeking to buy discounted retail items from redeemed pawned goods
Those who own gold, jewelry, coins, or firearms and want to sell directly for immediate cash
Individuals needing check cashing or money services at a local trusted establishment
diagnosis: Quick-Cash is best for Greater Cincinnati-area residents who own items of value and need immediate cash, or who require check cashing and money services from an established local business. Primary caveat: pawn loans mean risking loss of personal property if unable to repay, and the website provides no published terms, rates, or loan limits to help borrowers compare or plan repayment.
services: Cash loans against pawned personal items
Auto pawn loans (collateral-based loans using vehicles)
Discount retail sales of redeemed items

places_enrichment.adr_format_address: 1914 Monmouth St, Newport, KY 41071-3072, USA
